4_content_quality.technical_depth: 12/15 - Covers multiple scientific domains (protein folding, materials, climate/weather, particle physics, literature mining) and names concrete models (AlphaFold2/RoseTTAFold, MLIPs, GNoME, GraphCast/FourCastNet, reaction transformers). However, method descriptions are often high-level (limited algorithmic detail, evaluation specifics, uncertainty quantification methods, and domain-specific validation pitfalls), and some claims are broad without technical substantiation.
4_content_quality.coverage_impact: 9/10 - Strong breadth across domains and clearly articulates workflow impacts (acceleration, new inquiry modes, democratization) with representative examples. Impact discussion would be stronger with more quantified comparisons, clearer separation of demonstrated vs prospective benefits, and more attention to negative scientific externalities (automation bias, publication inflation) beyond brief mentions.
4_content_quality.industry_policy: 8/10 - Industry section identifies key trends (platformization, data moats, self-driving labs, investment) with relevant company/examples; policy section addresses IP, research security, peer review integrity, and equity. Depth is substantive but still somewhat narrative: limited engagement with concrete regulatory frameworks (e.g., specific AI Act provisions), governance mechanisms, or empirically grounded market metrics.
4_content_quality.writing_clarity: 5/5 - Well-structured, coherent, and readable with clear sectioning and signposting; terminology is consistent and arguments are easy to follow.
4_content_quality.comment: A strong, well-organized survey with credible examples across key scientific domains and a solid challenges/policy discussion. It falls short of expert technical depth due to limited methodological granularity and sparse evidence/metrics supporting several high-level claims.

2_latex_format.sections: 6/7 - Found: abstract, introduction, body_sections, conclusion; Missing: title

eval_report.comment: Adequate: basic requirements met but notable weaknesses.
